definitions.text: ISO 639-2 ISO 639-3 language code for Kirundi.
To move swiftly. To move forward quickly upon two feet by alternately making a short jump off either foot.
examples: Run, and you might still catch the train!
I have been running all over the building looking for him.

definitions.text: To move forward quickly upon two feet by alternately making a short jump off either foot.
examples: Run, and you might still catch the train!

definitions.text: Act or instance of running, of moving rapidly using the feet.
examples: I just got back from my morning run.

definitions.text: Act or instance of hurrying (to or from a place) ; dash or errand, trip.
examples: I need to make a run to the store.
Let's go for a run in the car.

definitions.text: In a liquid state; melted or molten.
examples: Put some run butter on the vegetables.
